title: Reminders
desc: Set when and how you receive alerts
personalizeCategoriesDesc: Adjust the profile for each type
personalizeDesc: Each category can have its own reminder profile. Changes are saved automatically.
categoryConfig: Configure when and how to receive alerts
offsetsDesc: Select how far in advance you want to be notified

intentBody.prepare_exam: You have an upcoming assessment for {{entity}}.
intentBody.attend_class: Your {{entity}} class is about to start.
intentBody.review_cards: You have cards to review in {{entity}}.
intentBody.digest: Here is your weekly digest for {{entity}}.
intentBody.follow_up: Don't forget to follow up on {{entity}}.

infoBody1: Reminders are created automatically. You don't need to configure them here manually.
infoBody2: When you add an assessment, a calendar event, or a class schedule, Threshold's engine automatically schedules alerts based on the profile you've configured (Minimal, Standard, Persistent).
infoBody3: This screen is just an observability window so you can see how many alerts the system has scheduled for you and when.
